message:
fix(pages): await async settings init and render in viewer

Make initSettings() async so the initial render() call is properly
awaited, letting errors propagate correctly instead of silently
swallowing them.

Refactor viewer.js to extract three async helpers:
- initializeSettingsAfterStorageReady: awaits initSettings with a
  second lifecycle-epoch guard after the await point to catch stale
  callbacks
- renderSettingsPanelAfterStorageReady: guards on result.ok,
  settingsReady, and current view state before rendering
- renderSettingsPanelNow: awaits renderSettings() with try/catch

Add bundle-test assertions in pages_bundle.rs verifying both
settings.js and viewer.js use async/await throughout the settings
initialization and render paths.

Also picks up Cargo.lock update (chrono added to fsqlite-func).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
